instructions: Create a new file at docs/architecture/landscape.md and populate it with the Jitsu vs. SOTA competitive analysis. The content should include sections on: What Jitsu Actually Is, Core Innovations (U-Curve, AST-First, Structured Directives, Recovery Loop), SOTA Landscape Comparison table, Strengths, and Gaps. Ensure high-quality markdown formatting.
anti_patterns: Don't deviate from the provided analysis content.
Don't forget to include the comparison table.
completion_criteria: docs/architecture/landscape.md is created with the competitive analysis content.

instructions: Update README.md and docs/index.md to link to the new docs/architecture/landscape.md. In README.md, add a link in a relevant section (e.g., Architecture or Philosophy). In docs/index.md, add it to the architecture section of the documentation index.
anti_patterns: Don't break existing links or formatting.
Don't add redundant links if they already exist.
completion_criteria: README.md contains a working link to the landscape document.
docs/index.md includes the landscape document in its index.
